entries.original:
"I came here with some friends to
catch us some BUG POKéMON!

They're all itching to get into

entries.translated:
"I cam2 her2 wit2 som2 friend2 t2

They're al2 itchin2 t2 ge2 int2
som2 POKéMON battles!"

entries.original:

That's why you can never have too

entries.translated:
"I wa2 throwin2 POKé BALL2 t2

That's wh2 yo2 ca2 neve2 hav2 to2

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

If your POKéMON are weak and you
want to avoid battles, stay away

entries.translated:
"TRAINE2 TIP2

I2 you2 POKéMON ar2 wea2 an2 yo2
wan2 t2 avoi2 battles, sta2 awa2

"For poison, use ANTIDOTE!
Get it at POKéMON MARTS!"
entries.translated:
"Fo2 poison, us2 ANTIDOTE!
Ge2 i2 a2 POKéMON MARTS!"

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

Contact PROF. OAK via a PC to

entries.translated:
"TRAINE2 TIP2

Contac2 PROF. OA2 vi2 a P2 t2
ge2 you2 POKéDEX evaluated!"

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

You can't catch a POKéMON that
belongs to someone else.

Throw POKé BALLS only at wild
POKéMON to catch them!"
entries.translated:
"TRAINE2 TIP2

Yo2 can't catc2 a POKéMON tha2
belong2 t2 someon2 else.

Thro2 POKé BALL2 onl2 a2 wil2

"TRAINE2 TIP2

capture!

Whe2 healthy, the2 ma2 escape!"

"LEAVIN2 VIRIDIA2 FORES2

"Ssh! You'll scare the bugs away.

"Ssh! You'll scar2 th2 bug2 away.

"Tha2 totall2 stinks! I'm goin2 t2

"BU2 POKéMON evolv2 quickly.

"Beware!

"Beware!
ZUBA2 i2 a bloodsucker!"

"Kid2 lik2 yo2 shouldn't b2

Wher2 migh2 the2 be?"

entries.original:

entries.translated:
"I sa2 them!
I'm sur2 they're fro2 TEA2 ROCKET!"

entries.original:
"ZUBAT is tough!
But if you can catch one, you'll

entries.translated:
"ZUBA2 i2 tough!
Bu2 i2 yo2 ca2 catc2 one, you'll

entries.original:

entries.translated:
"We'll eac2 tak2 a fossil!
N2 bein2 greedy!"

entries.translated:
"Fa2 away, o2 CINNABA2 ISLAND,
there's a POKéMON LAB.

entries.original: "Do you want the DOME FOSSIL?"
entries.translated: "D2 yo2 wan2 th2 DOM2 FOSSIL?"

entries.translated: "Obtaine2 th2 DOM2 FOSSIL!"

entries.translated: "D2 yo2 wan2 th2 HELI2 FOSSIL?"

entries.original:

entries.original:
"Bonjour!
I am le waiter on this ship!

I will be happy to serve you

\. \. \.
Ah! Le strong silent type!"

I a2 l2 waite2 o2 thi2 ship!

\. \. \.

entries.translated:
"Th2 passenger2 ar2 restles2 fro2

Yo2 migh2 b2 challenge2 b2 th2

entries.original:
"[rival]: Bonjour!
[player]!

Imagine seeing you here!
[player], were you really invited?

So how's your POKéDEX coming?

I already caught 40 kinds, pal.
Different kinds are everywhere.

Crawl around in grassy areas, and
look hard for them."
entries.translated:
"[rival]: Bonjour!
[player]!

Imagin2 seein2 yo2 here!
[player], wer2 yo2 reall2 invited?

S2 how's you2 POKéDEX coming?

I alread2 caugh2 40 kinds, pal.
Differen2 kind2 ar2 everywhere.

Craw2 aroun2 i2 grass2 areas, an2
loo2 har2 fo2 them."

entries.original:
"[rival]: I heard there was a CUT
master on board.

But he was just a seasick old man!

CUT itself is really useful.
Yup, it'll be handy.

You should go see him, too.
Smell ya!"
entries.translated:
"[rival]: I hear2 ther2 wa2 a CU2
maste2 o2 board.

Bu2 h2 wa2 jus2 a seasic2 ol2 man!

CU2 itsel2 i2 reall2 useful.
Yup, it'll b2 handy.

Yo2 shoul2 g2 se2 him, too.
Smel2 ya!"

entries.original:
"This ship, she is a luxury liner for
TRAINERS of the world!

At every port, we hold parties with
invited TRAINERS."
entries.translated:
"Thi2 ship, sh2 i2 a luxur2 line2 fo2
TRAINER2 o2 th2 world!

A2 ever2 port, w2 hol2 partie2 wit2
invite2 TRAINERS."

entries.original:
"Our CAPTAIN is a sword master.
He's awesome at using CUT.

They say he even teaches CUT

entries.translated:
"Ou2 CAPTAI2 i2 a swor2 master.
He's awesom2 a2 usin2 CUT.

The2 sa2 h2 eve2 teache2 CU2
t2 POKéMON!"

The ship will be departing soon."
entries.translated:
"Th2 party's over.
Th2 shi2 wil2 b2 departin2 soon."

"Urf\. I feel ill\.

entries.translated:
"Urf\. I fee2 ill\.

I go2 seasick, s2 I steppe2 ou2 t2
ge2 som2 air\."

entries.translated:
"Whew!
Scrubbin2 deck2 i2 har2 work!"

"Ho2 man2 kind2 o2 POKéMON d2 yo2
thin2 ther2 ar2 i2 thi2 bi2 world?"

"M2 p2 sai2 ther2 ar2 100 kind2 o2

"You, mo2 petit!
We're bus2 here!
Ou2 o2 th2 way!"

"I sa2 a2 od2 BERR2 i2 th2 trash.

"I'm s2 bus2 I'm gettin2 dizzy!

entries.original:

Le main course is"

"Er-hem!

"Salmon du Salad!

But, hav2 I enoug2 fillet2 d2

entries.original:
"Hum-de-hum-de-ho\.

Hum-hum\."
entries.translated:
"Hum-de-hum-de-ho\.

I pee2 spud2 ever2 day!
Hum-hum\."

entries.original:
"Did you hear about SNORLAX?

No other POKéMON eats and sleeps

"Di2 yo2 hea2 abou2 SNORLAX?

N2 othe2 POKéMON eat2 an2 sleep2

"Snivel\. Sniff\.

Snivel\."

I onl2 ge2 t2 pee2 onions\.

entries.original:
"CAPTAIN: Ooargh\.
I feel hideous\.
Urrp! Seasick\."
entries.translated:
"CAPTAIN: Ooargh\.
I fee2 hideous\.
Urrp! Seasick\."

entries.original:
"CAPTAIN: Whew! Thank you!
I'm feeling much better now.

You want to see my hidden CUT
technique?

I could show you my prized CUT
technique if I weren't so ill\.

I know! You can have this!
This HIDDEN MACHINE!

Teach CUT to your POKéMON, and
you can see it CUT anytime!"
entries.translated:
"CAPTAIN: Whew! Than2 you!
I'm feelin2 muc2 bette2 now.

Yo2 wan2 t2 se2 m2 hidde2 CU2
technique?

I coul2 sho2 yo2 m2 prize2 CU2
techniqu2 i2 I weren't s2 ill\.

I know! Yo2 ca2 hav2 this!
Thi2 HIDDE2 MACHINE!

Teac2 CU2 t2 you2 POKéMON, an2
yo2 ca2 se2 i2 CU2 anytime!"

entries.original:
"[player] obtained HM01
from the CAPTAIN!"
entries.translated:
"[player] obtaine2 HM01
fro2 th2 CAPTAIN!"

entries.original:
"Using CUT, you can chop down

"Usin2 CUT, yo2 ca2 cho2 dow2

Wh2 no2 tr2 i2 wit2 th2 tree2

entries.original:
"Oh, no!

entries.translated:

Yo2 hav2 n2 roo2 fo2 this!"

entries.original:
"CAPTAIN: \.Whew!

Now that I'm not sick anymore,
I guess it's time.

The S.S. ANNE will set sail soon!

Farewell, until our return to
VERMILION CITY!"
entries.translated:
"CAPTAIN: \.Whew!

No2 tha2 I'm no2 sic2 anymore,
I gues2 it's time.

Th2 S.S. ANN2 wil2 se2 sai2 soon!

Farewell, unti2 ou2 retur2 t2
VERMILIO2 CITY!"

entries.original:
"Yuck!
Shouldn't have looked!"
entries.translated:
"Yuck!
Shouldn't hav2 looked!"

entries.original:
"How to Conquer Seasickness\.
The CAPTAIN's reading this!"
entries.translated:
"Ho2 t2 Conque2 Seasickness\.
Th2 CAPTAIN's readin2 this!"

entries.original:
"Ssh\.!
I'm a GLOBAL POLICE agent.

I'm on the trail of TEAM ROCKET.
They're up to nothing good!"
entries.translated:
"Ssh\.!
I'm a GLOBA2 POLIC2 agent.

I'm o2 th2 trai2 o2 TEA2 ROCKET.
They're u2 t2 nothin2 good!"

entries.translated:
"W2 ar2 cruisin2 aroun2 th2 world,

entries.original:
"You hurt my poor POKéMON!

"Yo2 hur2 m2 poo2 POKéMON!

I deman2 tha2 yo2 hea2 the2 a2 a

"Listen, listen!
Le2 m2 b2 you2 friend, okay?

The2 w2 ca2 trad2 POKéMON an2

entries.original:
"I always travel with WIGGLYTUFF.

entries.translated:
"I alway2 trave2 wit2 WIGGLYTUFF.
I neve2 leav2 hom2 withou2 it."

entries.original:
"A world cruise is so elegant yet

entries.translated:
"A worl2 cruis2 i2 s2 elegan2 ye2
cozy!"

entries.original: "WIGGLYTUFF: Puup pupuu!"
entries.translated: "WIGGLYTUFF: Puu2 pupuu!"

entries.original:
"Waitress, I would like a cherry

entries.translated:
"Waitress, I woul2 lik2 a cherr2
pie, please!"

entries.original:
"Waiter, I would like a cherry pie,
please!"
entries.translated:
"Waiter, I woul2 lik2 a cherr2 pie,
please!"

entries.original:
"I wish to be left alone!
Get out!"
entries.translated:
"I wis2 t2 b2 lef2 alone!
Ge2 out!"

entries.original: "You should be nice to friends!"
entries.translated: "Yo2 shoul2 b2 nic2 t2 friends!"

entries.original:
"Party?

entries.translated:
"Party?

Th2 cruis2 ship's part2 shoul2 b2
ove2 b2 now."

entries.original:
"Fifteen years ago, I would

entries.translated:
"Fiftee2 year2 ago, I woul2
hav2 won!"

entries.original:
"Ah, yes, I have seen some POKéMON

entries.translated:
"Ah, yes, I hav2 see2 som2 POKéMON

entries.original:
"Small trees can be chopped down

But remember this!
CUT is an HM technique.

Once learned, it is not so easily

"Smal2 tree2 ca2 b2 choppe2 dow2

Bu2 remembe2 this!
CU2 i2 a2 H2 technique.

Onc2 learned, i2 i2 no2 s2 easil2
discarded."

entries.original:
"Personally, I prefer strong and

entries.translated:
"Personally, I prefe2 stron2 an2
rar2 POKéMON."

entries.original:
"Oh, I adore your strong POKéMON!
Oh, how I envy you for them!"
entries.translated:
"Oh, I ador2 you2 stron2 POKéMON!
Oh, ho2 I env2 yo2 fo2 them!"

entries.original:
"Have you gone to the SAFARI ZONE

entries.translated:
"Hav2 yo2 gon2 t2 th2 SAFAR2 ZON2

POKéMON."

"M2 an2 m2 dadd2 thin2 th2 SAFAR2
ZON2 i2 awesome!
I wis2 w2 coul2 g2 ther2 again."

entries.original:
"The CAPTAIN said he's awfully sick.

entries.translated:
"Th2 CAPTAI2 sai2 he's awfull2 sick.
H2 wa2 al2 pale."

entries.original: "I hear many people get seasick."
entries.translated: "I hea2 man2 peopl2 ge2 seasick."

entries.original:
"I was going to make you my
assistant, too!"
entries.translated:
"I wa2 goin2 t2 mak2 yo2 m2
assistant, too!"

entries.original:
"When we're out at sea, jellyfish

"Whe2 we're ou2 a2 sea, jellyfis2

"Se2 POKéMON liv2 i2 dee2 water.
You'll nee2 a RO2 t2 fis2 the2 up!"

entries.original:
"Hahaha!

entries.translated:
"Hahaha!
Wan2 t2 b2 a sailor, mate?"

entries.original:
"Did you see the FISHING GURU in

entries.original:

entries.original: "MACHOKE: Gwoh! Goggoh!"
entries.translated: "MACHOKE: Gwoh! Goggoh!"

entries.original:
"You look tired. Would you like to

"I'm glad to see that everyone is

entries.original:
"Oh, I'm sorry for fussing over you.
You look like my little sister\."
entries.translated:
"Oh, I'm sorr2 fo2 fussin2 ove2 you.
Yo2 loo2 lik2 m2 littl2 sister\."

entries.original:
"Oh, I'm sorry for fussing over you.
You look like my little brother\."
entries.translated:
"Oh, I'm sorr2 fo2 fussin2 ove2 you.
Yo2 loo2 lik2 m2 littl2 brother\."

entries.original:
"Hi!

"Hi!
D2 yo2 hav2 a [buffer1]?

Wan2 t2 trad2 i2 fo2 m2
[buffer2]?"

entries.original: "Thanks, you're a pal!"
entries.translated: "Thanks, you're a pal!"

entries.original: "That's too bad."
entries.translated: "That's to2 bad."

entries.original:
"\.This is no [buffer1].

If you get one, trade it with me."
entries.translated:

I2 yo2 ge2 one, trad2 i2 wit2 me."

"How is my old [buffer2]?

entries.translated:
"Ho2 i2 m2 ol2 [buffer2]?
M2 [buffer1] i2 doin2 great!"

entries.original:
"People often lose things in the

entries.translated:

entries.translated:

D2 yo2 g2 ther2 ver2 often?"

entries.original:
"I went inside ROCK TUNNEL, but it's

entries.translated:
"I wen2 insid2 ROC2 TUNNEL, bu2 it's

I2 I coul2 ge2 a POKéMON t2 us2

"Well, isn't this a surprise!

entries.translated:
"Well, isn't thi2 a surprise!

I2 goe2 righ2 t2 VIRIDIA2 CITY,

entries.original:
"I never wanted to lose to anybody,

entries.translated:

entries.original:

entries.translated:

"I can beat you when it comes to

"If you get stuck, try moving some

entries.translated:

boulder2 around."

entries.original: "[rival] also came through here."
entries.translated: "[rival] als2 cam2 throug2 here."

entries.translated:

I was\."

entries.original:

entries.translated:

entries.original:
"RAY: You've beaten us.

entries.translated:

entries.original:

entries.original:
"Blast it\. You're dissing TEAM
ROCKET, aren't you?"
entries.translated:
"Blas2 it\. You're dissin2 TEA2
ROCKET, aren't you?"

entries.original:
"You're not going to get away with

entries.translated:

this, brat!"

entries.original:
"SILPH SCOPE? Humph!

entries.translated:

I don't kno2 wher2 i2 is."

entries.original:
"Okay, I'll talk\.
Take the elevator to see my BOSS."
entries.translated:

Tak2 th2 elevato2 t2 se2 m2 BOSS."

entries.original:

Bu2 yo2 can't ru2 th2 elevato2

"I see that you raise POKéMON with

I droppe2 th2 LIF2 KEY!"

"Do you have something against TEAM

entries.translated:

ROCKET?"

entries.original:

entries.translated:

I'm sorr2 I faile2 you!"

entries.original: "It appears to need a key."
entries.translated: "I2 appear2 t2 nee2 a key."

Th2 PRESIDEN2 i2 i2 th2 boardroo2

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
1F"

1F"

2F"

2F"

"[player]!

"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
3F"

"SILP2 CO. HEA2 OFFIC2
3F"

4F"

4F"

entries.translated:

"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
5F"

5F"

"The ROCKETS came and took over

entries.original:
"Oh dear, oh dear.

"O2 dear, o2 dear.
Hel2 me, please!"

entries.original:
"We got engaged.
Heheh!"
entries.translated:

Heheh!"

entries.original:
"That man next to me\.
He's such a coward!"
entries.translated:

He's suc2 a coward!"

entries.original:
"He's so helpless, he needed

entries.translated:

entries.original:
"TEAM ROCKET is trying to conquer

entries.translated:

th2 worl2 wit2 POKéMON."

entries.original:
"TEAM ROCKET ran away, and it's all

entries.translated:
"TEA2 ROCKE2 ra2 away, an2 it's al2
becaus2 o2 you!"

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
6F"
entries.translated:
"SILP2 CO. HEA2 OFFIC2
6F"

entries.original:
"TIKSI BRANCH?

entries.translated:

It's i2 Russia2 no-man's-land!"

entries.original:
"No matter!
My brothers will avenge me!"
entries.translated:
"N2 matter!
M2 brother2 wil2 aveng2 me!"

entries.original:
"If you stand for justice, you

entries.translated:
"I2 yo2 stan2 fo2 justice, yo2
betra2 u2 ba2 guys!"

entries.original: "[rival]: What kept you, [player]?"
entries.translated: "[rival]: Wha2 kep2 you, [player]?"

entries.original:
"[rival]: Hahaha! I thought you'd
turn up if I waited here!

I guess TEAM ROCKET slowed you
down! Not that I care!

I saw you in SAFFRON, so I decided
to see if you got better!"
entries.translated:
"[rival]: Hahaha! I though2 you'd
tur2 u2 i2 I waite2 here!

I gues2 TEA2 ROCKE2 slowe2 yo2
down! No2 tha2 I care!

I sa2 yo2 i2 SAFFRON, s2 I decide2
t2 se2 i2 yo2 go2 better!"

entries.original:
"Well, [player]!
I'm moving on up and ahead!

By checking my POKéDEX, I'm
starting to see what's strong and
how they evolve!

Am I a genius or what?

I'm going to the POKéMON LEAGUE to
boot out the ELITE FOUR.

I'll become the world's most
powerful TRAINER!

[player], well, good luck to you!
Don't sweat it!
Smell ya!"
entries.translated:
"Well, [player]!
I'm movin2 o2 u2 an2 ahead!

B2 checkin2 m2 POKéDEX, I'm
startin2 t2 se2 what's stron2 an2
ho2 the2 evolve!

A2 I a geniu2 o2 what?

I'm goin2 t2 th2 POKéMON LEAGU2 t2
boo2 ou2 th2 ELIT2 FOUR.

I'll becom2 th2 world's mos2
powerfu2 TRAINER!

[player], well, goo2 luc2 t2 you!
Don't swea2 it!
Smel2 ya!"

entries.original:
"Oh! Hi! You're not a ROCKET!
You came to save us?
Why, thank you!

I want you to have this POKéMON
for saving us."
entries.translated:
"Oh! Hi! You're no2 a ROCKET!
Yo2 cam2 t2 sav2 us?
Why, than2 you!

I wan2 yo2 t2 hav2 thi2 POKéMON
fo2 savin2 us."

"Do you want to give a nickname to

entries.translated:
"D2 yo2 wan2 t2 giv2 a nicknam2 t2
thi2 [buffer1]?"

entries.original:
"It's a LAPRAS.
It's a very intelligent POKéMON.

We kept it in our lab, but it will
be much better off with you.

I think you will be a good TRAINER

It's a good swimmer.
It'll give you a lift across water!"
entries.translated:
"It's a LAPRAS.
It's a ver2 intelligen2 POKéMON.

W2 kep2 i2 i2 ou2 lab, bu2 i2 wil2
b2 muc2 bette2 of2 wit2 you.

I thin2 yo2 wil2 b2 a goo2 TRAINE2
fo2 LAPRAS!

It's a goo2 swimmer.
It'll giv2 yo2 a lif2 acros2 water!"

entries.original:
"TEAM ROCKET's BOSS went to the
boardroom!

Is our PRESIDENT okay?
I'm worried."
entries.translated:
"TEA2 ROCKET's BOS2 wen2 t2 th2
boardroom!

I2 ou2 PRESIDEN2 okay?
I'm worried."

"TEAM ROCKET was after the MASTER

BALL, whic2 catche2 an2 POKéMON."

too2 ove2 SILP2 o2 ou2 POKéMON."

Yo2 chase2 of2 TEA2 ROCKE2 al2 b2
yourself?"

entries.original:
"You!

entries.translated:
"You!
It's reall2 dangerou2 here!

Yo2 cam2 t2 sav2 me?
Yo2 can't!"

entries.original: "Thank you so much!"
entries.translated: "Than2 yo2 s2 much!"

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
7F"
entries.translated:
"SILP2 CO. HEA2 OFFIC2
7F"

entries.original:
"Despite your age, you are a

entries.original: "I wonder if SILPH is finished\."
entries.translated: "I wonde2 i2 SILP2 i2 finished\."

entries.original: "Thanks for saving us!"

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
8F"
entries.translated:
"SILP2 CO. HEA2 OFFIC2
8F"

entries.original:
"So, what do you think of SILPH

BUILDING's maze?"

entries.original:
"If you don't turn back\.

entries.original: "I'll leave you up to my brothers."

entries.original:
"You look tired.

entries.translated:
"Yo2 loo2 tired.

entries.original: "Don't give up!"
entries.translated: "Don't giv2 up!"

entries.original: "Thank you so much."
entries.translated: "Than2 yo2 s2 much."

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
9F"
entries.translated:
"SILP2 CO. HEA2 OFFIC2
9F"

entries.original:
"Exploiting weak spots does work.

entries.translated:

entries.original:
"If I had started as a TRAINER at

entries.original: "My brothers will avenge me!"

entries.original:
"Waaaaa!

entries.translated:
"Waaaaa!
I'm scared!"

entries.original:
"About me crying\.

entries.original:
"SILPH CO. HEAD OFFICE
10F"
entries.translated:

10F"

entries.original:
"[player] obtained a MASTER BALL

entries.original:
"PRESIDENT: You can't buy that

"The funny patterns on the ground\.

grandpa's clothes."
entries.translated:
"Th2 funn2 pattern2 o2 th2 ground\.

The2 loo2 lik2 th2 pattern2 o2 m2
grandpa's clothes."

"Ayup, you townies come around all

How about giving me that?"
entries.translated:
"Ayup, yo2 townie2 com2 aroun2 al2
s2 dand2 wit2 a ha2 tha2 flashy\.

Ho2 abou2 givin2 m2 that?"

entries.original:
"First, exhale.
Blow everything out.

When you can't exhale anymore,
inhale the clean air!

Isn't it refreshing?"
entries.translated:
"First, exhale.
Blo2 everythin2 out.

Whe2 yo2 can't exhal2 anymore,
inhal2 th2 clea2 air!

Isn't i2 refreshing?"

entries.original:
"I'm going to keep on collecting

Am I the only girl like that?"
entries.translated:
"I'm goin2 t2 kee2 o2 collectin2
BU2 POKéMON.

A2 I th2 onl2 gir2 lik2 that?"

entries.original:
"I'm going to observe the night sky
here."
entries.translated:
"I'm goin2 t2 observ2 th2 nigh2 sk2
here."

entries.original:
"A little cut like that\.
A little spit's enough to cure it!"
entries.translated:
"A littl2 cu2 lik2 that\.
A littl2 spit's enoug2 t2 cur2 it!"

entries.original:
"There are places here in PATTERN

entries.translated:
"Ther2 ar2 place2 her2 i2 PATTER2

Wha2 coul2 b2 th2 caus2 o2 suc2

entries.original:
"That was too bad.

I think you put in a tremendous
effort in your battling.

Please come back and try again!"
entries.translated:
"Tha2 wa2 to2 bad.

I thin2 yo2 pu2 i2 a tremendou2
effor2 i2 you2 battling.

Pleas2 com2 bac2 an2 tr2 again!"

entries.original:
"When the TRAINERS switch places,

To avoid the stampede, we moved
the reception counter here.

I'm sorry for the inconvenience."

"Whe2 th2 TRAINER2 switc2 places,

T2 avoi2 th2 stampede, w2 move2
th2 receptio2 counte2 here.

I'm sorr2 fo2 th2 inconvenience."

entries.original: "I hope you give it your best."
entries.translated: "I hop2 yo2 giv2 i2 you2 best."

entries.original: "Thank you for competing!"
entries.translated: "Than2 yo2 fo2 competing!"

entries.original: "Please come again!"
entries.translated: "Pleas2 com2 again!"

entries.original:
"Hello!

Welcome to TRAINER TOWER where
TRAINERS gather from all over!"
entries.translated:
"Hello!

Welcom2 t2 TRAINE2 TOWE2 wher2
TRAINER2 gathe2 fro2 al2 over!"

entries.original:
"TRAINERS from all over the world

Let me see\.

Right now, there are TRAINERS only

"TRAINER2 fro2 al2 ove2 th2 worl2

Le2 m2 see\.

Righ2 now, ther2 ar2 TRAINER2 onl2

entries.original:
"TRAINERS are awaiting your
challenge up to the eighth floor."
entries.translated:
"TRAINER2 ar2 awaitin2 you2
challeng2 u2 t2 th2 eight2 floor."

entries.original:
"Here at TRAINER TOWER, there is an
event called TIME ATTACK.

You will be timed on how quickly
you can get from the reception
counter to the OWNER on the roof.

The best times will be recorded on
the Time Board.

Try competing with friends to see
who can beat it the fastest.

You will not earn any EXP. Points
or money by beating TRAINERS here."

"Her2 a2 TRAINE2 TOWER, ther2 i2 a2
even2 calle2 TIM2 ATTACK.

Yo2 wil2 b2 time2 o2 ho2 quickl2

counte2 t2 th2 OWNE2 o2 th2 roof.

Th2 bes2 time2 wil2 b2 recorde2 o2
th2 Tim2 Board.

Tr2 competin2 wit2 friend2 t2 se2
wh2 ca2 bea2 i2 th2 fastest.

Yo2 wil2 no2 ear2 an2 EXP. Point2
o2 mone2 b2 beatin2 TRAINER2 here."

entries.original:
"Okay, I'll get the clock started,
so give it everything you have.

On your marks\.

Get set\.

Go!"
entries.translated:
"Okay, I'll ge2 th2 cloc2 started,
s2 giv2 i2 everythin2 yo2 have.

O2 you2 marks\.

Ge2 set\.

Go!"

entries.original: "Please do visit us again!"
entries.translated: "Pleas2 d2 visi2 u2 again!"

entries.original:
"I'm here to see how good I am.

I wonder what kinds of TRAINERS

It's nerve-racking!"
entries.translated:
"I'm her2 t2 se2 ho2 goo2 I am.

I wonde2 wha2 kind2 o2 TRAINER2

It's nerve-racking!"

entries.original:
"Gasp, gasp\.
Gasp\.

Never mind battling! These stairs\.
They're tougher than any battle\."
entries.translated:
"Gasp, gasp\.
Gasp\.

Neve2 min2 battling! Thes2 stairs\.
They're toughe2 tha2 an2 battle\."

entries.original:
"I'm trying to get out of here, but

entries.translated:
"I'm tryin2 t2 ge2 ou2 o2 here, bu2

Mayb2 th2 numbe2 o2 boulder2 i2

entries.original:
"Earlier, a lady went into the caves

entries.translated:
"Earlier, a lad2 wen2 int2 th2 cave2
ahead."

entries.original:
"W-what do you intend to do with

entries.translated:
"W-what d2 yo2 inten2 t2 d2 wit2
me?"

entries.original:
"I am so glad that you happened
here.

I grew rather bored of walking,

May I ask you to take me home

"I a2 s2 gla2 tha2 yo2 happene2
here.

I gre2 rathe2 bore2 o2 walking,
an2 I a2 feelin2 fatigued.

Ma2 I as2 yo2 t2 tak2 m2 hom2
fro2 here?"

entries.original:
"Hey, there!
How's it going?

What am I doing here, you ask?
Why, I'm prospecting for gold!

When I strike it rich, I'm buying
a house in KANTO."
entries.translated:
"Hey, there!
How's i2 going?

Wha2 a2 I doin2 here, yo2 ask?
Why, I'm prospectin2 fo2 gold!

Whe2 I strik2 i2 rich, I'm buyin2
a hous2 i2 KANTO."

entries.original:
"Hey, there! How's it going?
Did you hear? I've struck gold!

You remembered that I was
prospecting, didn't you?

You can't begin to imagine just
how happy I am.

So, I'll show you!
This is for you!"
entries.translated:
"Hey, there! How's i2 going?
Di2 yo2 hear? I've struc2 gold!

Yo2 remembere2 tha2 I wa2
prospecting, didn't you?

Yo2 can't begi2 t2 imagin2 jus2
ho2 happ2 I am.

So, I'll sho2 you!
Thi2 i2 fo2 you!"

entries.original:
"Whoops, your BAG is crammed full!
I'll give this to you later."
entries.translated:
"Whoops, you2 BA2 i2 cramme2 full!
I'll giv2 thi2 t2 yo2 later."

entries.original:
"That's a NUGGET!

I can't give you any nuggets of

entries.translated:
"That's a NUGGET!

I can't giv2 yo2 an2 nugget2 o2
wisdom, s2 that'll hav2 t2 do!"

entries.original:
"A mysterious rumble echoed

entries.translated:
"A mysteriou2 rumbl2 echoe2
somewher2 fa2 away."

entries.original:
"Hm!
Haaaaaaaaaaah!

Aaaah! This is heavenly!
The water warms me to my core!

You should jump in, too.

Go to the middle, relax, and get

"Hm!
Haaaaaaaaaaah!

Aaaah! Thi2 i2 heavenly!
Th2 wate2 warm2 m2 t2 m2 core!

Yo2 shoul2 jum2 in, too.

G2 t2 th2 middle, relax, an2 ge2

entries.translated:
"M2 favorit2 par2 o2 bathin2 come2

I enjo2 a bow2 o2 chowde2 t2
war2 m2 fro2 th2 inside, too!"

entries.original:
"Soaking in a hot spring pool is

entries.translated:
"Soakin2 i2 a ho2 sprin2 poo2 i2
therapeutic, peopl2 say."

entries.original:
"Have a look at my face.
See how smooth my skin is?

The hot spring's water keeps my

"Hav2 a loo2 a2 m2 face.
Se2 ho2 smoot2 m2 ski2 is?

Th2 ho2 spring's wate2 keep2 m2
ski2 younge2 tha2 m2 age."

entries.original:
"After an honest day of training,

the hot spring pool.

BRUNO, who's a senior ahead of me,

He comes to rehab injuries, both
his own and his POKéMON's."

th2 ho2 sprin2 pool.

BRUNO, who's a senio2 ahea2 o2 me,
visit2 th2 SP2 o2 occasion.

H2 come2 t2 reha2 injuries, bot2
hi2 ow2 an2 hi2 POKéMON's."

entries.original:
"Hot springs go hand-in-hand with

The EMBER SPA here, well,
I made it years ago.

I hewed the pool right out of a
gigantic boulder by hand.

I was using this at the time.
I suppose I can part with it."
entries.translated:
"Ho2 spring2 g2 hand-in-hand wit2

Th2 EMBE2 SP2 here, well,
I mad2 i2 year2 ago.

I hewe2 th2 poo2 righ2 ou2 o2 a
giganti2 boulde2 b2 hand.

I wa2 usin2 thi2 a2 th2 time.
I suppos2 I ca2 par2 wit2 it."

entries.original:
"That shatters boulders as if they

entries.translated:
"Tha2 shatter2 boulder2 a2 i2 the2
wer2 mad2 o2 crackers."

entries.original:
"The water is perfectly warm.
It feels exquisite\.

[player] and the POKéMON were
fully refreshed!"
entries.translated:
"Th2 wate2 i2 perfectl2 warm.
I2 feel2 exquisite\.

[player] an2 th2 POKéMON wer2
full2 refreshed!"

entries.original:
"OAK: Ah, [player]!

You're back, ar2 you?

Ho2 muc2 hav2 yo2 fille2 i2 you2
POKéDEX?

Ma2 I se2 it?

Let's see\."

entries.original:
"You've caught\. [buffer2]!?

Come.
Follow me."

"You've caught\. [buffer2]!?
Now, thi2 i2 impressive!

There's somethin2 I wante2 t2 as2
o2 you, [player].

Come.
Follo2 me."

"You've caught [buffer2]\.

Hm, i2 look2 a2 i2 you're puttin2

Whe2 yo2 manag2 t2 fil2 i2 som2

entries.original:
"OAK: Ah, [player]!

Knowing you, [player], I can easily

Good for you, good for you.
Hohoho."

Yo2 see2 t2 b2 enjoyin2 traveling.

Knowin2 you, [player], I ca2 easil2

Goo2 fo2 you, goo2 fo2 you.

entries.original:
"OAK: It's unsafe!

You need your own POKéMON for

I know!
Here, come with me!"

"OAK: It's unsafe!
Wil2 POKéMON liv2 i2 tal2 grass!

Yo2 nee2 you2 ow2 POKéMON fo2
you2 protection.

I know!
Here, com2 wit2 me!"

entries.original:
"Hmm\.
Is that right\."

"Hmm\.
I2 tha2 right\."

entries.original:
"Oh!
Look, look!"
entries.translated:
"Oh!
Look, look!"

entries.original:
"I'm raising POKéMON, too.

When they get strong, they can
protect me."
entries.translated:
"I'm raisin2 POKéMON, too.

Whe2 the2 ge2 strong, the2 ca2
protec2 me."

entries.original: "Read it, read it!"
entries.translated: "Rea2 it, rea2 it!"

entries.original: "Signs are useful, aren't they?"
entries.translated: "Sign2 ar2 useful, aren't they?"

"Technology is incredible!

You can now store and recall items

Yo2 ca2 no2 stor2 an2 recal2 item2

entries.translated: "OA2 POKéMON RESEARC2 LA2"

entries.original: "[player]'s house"
entries.translated: "[player]'s hous2"

entries.original: "[rival]'s house"
entries.translated: "[rival]'s hous2"

"PALLET TOWN

"PALLE2 TOW2

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS!

Press START to open the MENU!"

"TRAINE2 TIPS!

Pres2 STAR2 t2 ope2 th2 MENU!"

entries.original: "VIRIDIAN GYM's doors are locked\."

entries.original:
"VIRIDIAN CITY 
The Eternally Green Paradise"
entries.translated:
"VIRIDIA2 CIT2 
Th2 Eternall2 Gree2 Paradis2"

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

Catch POKéMON and expand your

Catc2 POKéMON an2 expan2 you2

entries.original:

entries.original:
"Well, now, I've had my coffee, and

"Well, now, I've had my coffee, and

Thi2 i2 privat2 property!"

"Yo2 wan2 t2 kno2 abou2 th2 tw2

"CATERPIE has no poison,

Watch that your POKéMON aren't

"CATERPI2 ha2 n2 poison,

Watc2 tha2 you2 POKéMON aren't

entries.original: "Oh, okay then!"
entries.translated: "Oh, oka2 then!"

entries.original:
"I go shopping in PEWTER CITY

I hav2 t2 tak2 th2 windin2 trai2 i2

entries.original:
"Oh, Grandpa!

I'm so sorry.
He hasn't had his coffee yet."

"Oh, Grandpa!
Don't b2 s2 mean!

I'm s2 sorry.
H2 hasn't ha2 hi2 coffe2 yet."

entries.original:
"Well, now, I've had my coffee, and
that's what I need to get going!

Hm?
What is that red box you have?

Ah, so you're working on your
POKéDEX.

Then let me give you a word of

Whenever you catch a POKéMON,

\.You don't know how to catch
a POKéMON?

I suppose I had better show you

"Well, now, I've ha2 m2 coffee, an2
that's wha2 I nee2 t2 ge2 going!

Hm?
Wha2 i2 tha2 re2 bo2 yo2 have?

Ah, s2 you're workin2 o2 you2
POKéDEX.

The2 le2 m2 giv2 yo2 a wor2 o2
advice.

Wheneve2 yo2 catc2 a POKéMON,

\.You don't kno2 ho2 t2 catc2
a POKéMON?

I suppos2 I ha2 bette2 sho2 yo2
then!"

"You're a TRAINER, right?

BROCK's lookin2 fo2 ne2
challengers. Follo2 me!"

The2 appeare2 afte2 MOO2 STONE2

"Really?

Yo2 absolutel2 hav2 t2 go!"

Yo2 hav2 t2 pa2 t2 ge2 in, bu2 it's

Bu2 PEWTE2 GYM's BROC2 isn't lik2

entries.original:
"TRAINER TIPS

entries.original:
"PEWTER CITY POKéMON GYM
LEADER: BROCK

"Look, it's me, BILL.

"BILL: Here we are!

"Here we are on an island smack in

Sh2 sai2 w2 no2 hav2 P2 linkag2

entries.original: "DODUO: Gigiih!"
entries.translated: "DODUO: Gigiih!"

entries.original:
"THREE ISLAND

Ki2 Islan2 o2 Famil2 Bondin2"

Fro2 thi2 da2 on, thi2 islan2

entries.original:
"[rival]: Hey!
[player]!

What are you doing here in the
SEVII ISLANDS?

You should quit copying me,
you know?

Anyways, I already got my POKéMON
EGG, so I'm done with this island.

Heh, I bet you don't even know
about POKéMON EGGS.

You'll never fill your NATIONAL
POKéDEX that way.

By the way, I saw someone we both
know on this island.

Why don't you go look around if
it makes you curious?

Me, I don't have the time to
waste.

Be smelling ya!"

"[rival]: Hey!
[player]!

Wha2 ar2 yo2 doin2 her2 i2 th2
SEVI2 ISLANDS?

Yo2 shoul2 qui2 copyin2 me,
yo2 know?

Anyways, I alread2 go2 m2 POKéMON
EGG, s2 I'm don2 wit2 thi2 island.

POKéDEX tha2 way.

Wh2 don't yo2 g2 loo2 aroun2 i2
i2 make2 yo2 curious?

Me, I don't hav2 th2 tim2 t2
waste.

B2 smellin2 ya!"

entries.original:
"I'm the DAY-CARE MAN.

I help take care of the precious
POKéMON of TRAINERS.

entries.original:
"Ah, it's you!

entries.original:
"[rival]: Hey! [player]!

without them.

any stronger?"

an2 stronger?"

LEAGUE?

warm-up for the POKéMON LEAGUE!

Come on!"

"Oh, that's\.

entries.original:

entries.original:
"Ah!
A new news report!

Hmm\.

I see!
That was quite informative!

"Oh, oh!
Th-this news report!

What an incredible piece of news!

"Oh, oh!
Th-this new2 report!

Amazing!
Wha2 a2 incredibl2 piec2 o2 news!

I'll give you more BERRIES than

I won't be bored for a while."

Yes, I a2 satisfied!
I won't b2 bore2 fo2 a while."

entries.original:
"Hm? Your BERRY POUCH is full.

entries.original:
"I concoct a variety of medicine

Using good BERRY POWDER, I can
make any kind of medicine.

Now tell me, have you any interest
in BERRIES?"

Usin2 goo2 BERR2 POWDER, I ca2
mak2 an2 kin2 o2 medicine.

No2 tel2 me, hav2 yo2 an2 interes2
i2 BERRIES?"

"Ah, good! For you, then, I have
just the thing."

"Ah, good! Fo2 you, then, I hav2
jus2 th2 thing."

entries.original:
"There's something new on the second
floor of POKéMON CENTERS, at the
DIRECT CORNER.

They installed a Wireless Adapter
machine for crushing BERRIES.

This is where you come in.

I have a favor to ask, one that
I can entrust only to you.

Could you make BERRY POWDER for
me using that machine?

Don't forget, the machine is at the
DIRECT CORNER of POKéMON CENTERS.

I'll concoct medicine for you if
you bring me some BERRY POWDER.

Don't forget, crush BERRIES into
BERRY POWDER and bring it to me."

"There's somethin2 ne2 o2 th2 secon2
floo2 o2 POKéMON CENTERS, a2 th2

The2 installe2 a Wireles2 Adapte2
machin2 fo2 crushin2 BERRIES.

I ca2 entrus2 onl2 t2 you.

Coul2 yo2 mak2 BERR2 POWDE2 fo2
m2 usin2 tha2 machine?

Don't forget, th2 machin2 i2 a2 th2
DIREC2 CORNE2 o2 POKéMON CENTERS.

I'll concoc2 medicin2 fo2 yo2 i2
yo2 brin2 m2 som2 BERR2 POWDER.

Don't forget, crus2 BERRIE2 int2
BERR2 POWDE2 an2 brin2 i2 t2 me."

Ho2 man2 BERRIE2 d2 yo2 have?

Youn2 one, it's importan2 t2 tak2 a2
interes2 i2 al2 sort2 o2 things."

entries.original:
"Er-hem! Have you brought me some

BERR2 POWDER?"

entries.original:

entries.original:

"G2 ahead! Laugh!

"POKéMON?

No, thi2 i2 a hote2 fo2 people.

entries.original: "Good luck!"

entries.original: "Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!"
entries.translated: "Welcom2 t2 th2 SAFAR2 ZONE!"

entries.original:
"For just $500, you can play the
SAFARI GAME.

Would you like to play?"

entries.original:
"Okay.

Pleas2 com2 again!"

"That'll be $500, please!

entries.translated:
"That'll b2 $500, please!

W2 onl2 us2 a specia2 kin2 o2

entries.original:
"We'll call you on the PA when you

"We'll cal2 yo2 o2 th2 P2 whe2 yo2

entries.original:
"Oops!

entries.translated:
"Oops!
No2 enoug2 money!"

entries.original:
"Hi! Is it your first time here at
the SAFARI ZONE?"
entries.translated:
"Hi! I2 i2 you2 firs2 tim2 her2 a2
th2 SAFAR2 ZONE?"

entries.original: "Sorry, you're a regular here!"
entries.translated: "Sorry, you're a regula2 here!"

entries.original:
"The SAFARI ZONE actually has
four zones in it.

Each zone has different kinds of
POKéMON, even some rare ones.

Use the supplied SAFARI BALLS to
catch them.

You can also throw BAIT or ROCKS
besides the SAFARI BALLS.

If you throw BAIT, the POKéMON
becomes less likely to flee, but
harder to catch.

If you throw ROCKS, the POKéMON
becomes more likely to flee, but
easier to catch.

When you run out of time or SAFARI
BALLS, it's game over for you!"
entries.translated:
"Th2 SAFAR2 ZON2 actuall2 ha2
fou2 zone2 i2 it.

Eac2 zon2 ha2 differen2 kind2 o2
POKéMON, eve2 som2 rar2 ones.

Us2 th2 supplie2 SAFAR2 BALL2 t2
catc2 them.

Yo2 ca2 als2 thro2 BAI2 o2 ROCK2
beside2 th2 SAFAR2 BALLS.

I2 yo2 thro2 BAIT, th2 POKéMON
become2 les2 likel2 t2 flee, bu2
harde2 t2 catch.

I2 yo2 thro2 ROCKS, th2 POKéMON
become2 mor2 likel2 t2 flee, bu2
easie2 t2 catch.

Whe2 yo2 ru2 ou2 o2 tim2 o2 SAFAR2
BALLS, it's gam2 ove2 fo2 you!"

entries.original:
"Did you try X SPEED?
It speeds up a POKéMON in battle."
entries.translated:
"Di2 yo2 tr2 X SPEED?
I2 speed2 u2 a POKéMON i2 battle."

entries.original:
"Don't they have any pennants

Aren't there even any calendars?"
entries.translated:
"Don't the2 hav2 an2 pennant2
promotin2 th2 SAFAR2 ZONE?

Ho2 abou2 som2 pape2 lanterns?
Aren't ther2 eve2 an2 calendars?"

entries.original:
"We nicknamed the WARDEN
\qoSLOWPOKE.\qc

You know, he has that vacant look
like a SLOWPOKE."
entries.translated:
"W2 nickname2 th2 WARDE2
\qoSLOWPOKE.\qc

Yo2 know, h2 ha2 tha2 vacan2 loo2
lik2 a SLOWPOKE."

"WARDEN SLOWPOKE is very

entries.translated:
"WARDE2 SLOWPOK2 i2 ver2

H2 eve2 ha2 som2 fossil2 o2 rare,

entries.translated:
"WARDE2 SLOWPOK2 cam2 in, bu2
I couldn't understan2 him.

I thin2 he's go2 a speec2 problem!"

entries.original:

If you can make it, you'll win a

I2 yo2 ca2 mak2 it, you'll wi2 a

entries.original:
"When afflicted by TOXIC, a POKéMON

It suffers worsening damage as the
battle wears on!

It will surely terrorize foes!"
entries.translated:
"Whe2 afflicte2 b2 TOXIC, a POKéMON

I2 suffer2 worsenin2 damag2 a2 th2
battl2 wear2 on!

I2 wil2 surel2 terroriz2 foes!"

"Now that you have the SOULBADGE,

Ah!
Take this, too!"

"No2 tha2 yo2 hav2 th2 SOULBADGE,

I2 als2 let2 yo2 SUR2 outsid2 o2

Ah!

"[player] receive2 TM06

I2 i2 a secre2 techniqu2 datin2

entries.original: "Make space for this, child!"

entries.original:
"WARDEN: Hif fuff hefifoo!

H2 lo2 h2 fee2 e2 hafah2 ho.

"[player] receive2 HM04

entries.original:
"WARDEN: Thanks, son!
You're a real lifesaver!

No one could understand a word

I was too ashamed to show my face

trouble."

N2 on2 coul2 understan2 a wor2
tha2 I said, no2 a one!

I wa2 to2 ashame2 t2 sho2 m2 fac2
aroun2 th2 OFFICE, even.

"Ah howhee ho hoo!

entries.original:
"Ha?

entries.original:
"WARDEN: Inside HM04 you'll find

entries.original:
"I'm the FISHING GURU's older
brother.

I can't bear to go without.

Tell me, do you like to fish?"

entries.original:
"Oh\.

"Oh\.
That's s2 disappointing\."

catc2 muc2 bette2 POKéMON."

"Oh, no!

"Uh\.

Would you like me to do that?"

"Uh\.
Oh, yes, I'm th2 MOV2 DELETER.

"[player] receive2 TM38

"FIR2 BLAS2 i2 th2 ultimat2 fir2

Don't wast2 i2 o2 WATE2 POKéMON."

entries.original: "Make space for this, child!"

"Fire, or to be more precise,

\.Oxygen in the air\.
Blah, blah, blah, blah\."

entries.original:
"Our LEADER, BLAINE, became lost

entries.original:

[player].

[player].

[player]!

[player]!

I kno2 tha2 you're strong.

entries.translated:
"I thin2 TRAINER2 ar2 s2 coo2 whe2

entries.original:
"Do you know what?

entries.original:
"BROCK's my hero!

"\.  \.

\.  \.
I'm BROCK's fan!

\.  \.
I'm BROCK's fan!

Eve2 i2 I wer2 hi2 onl2 fan,
I swea2 i2 o2 m2 rock-hard will,

"Hmm\.
An2 yo2 are?

Wer2 yo2 hopin2 t2 sig2 u2 fo2

entries.original:
"[player], I've had the pleasure of
watching you battle.

It brings back sweet memories of
my own long-lost youth.

May you continue to find success.
You have a fan in me!"

"[player], I've ha2 th2 pleasur2 o2

I2 bring2 bac2 swee2 memorie2 o2
m2 ow2 long-lost youth.

Ma2 yo2 continu2 t2 fin2 success.
Yo2 hav2 a fa2 i2 me!"

entries.original:
"I have journeyed far and wide
across the lands.

But never have I seen a TRAINER
of your magnificence.

Take courage in your abilities
and keep battling on!

Make that a promise to me,
my young idol!"

a winner.

a true POKéMON great\.

\. \.

You've still a ways to go!"

a winner.

Bu2 fo2 m2 t2 accep2 yo2 a2
a tru2 POKéMON great\.

\. \.

You've stil2 a way2 t2 go!"

here, too, if you keep winning."

fire.

I'll be your number one fan!"

Lately, al2 everyon2 talk2 abou2

I lov2 th2 wa2 h2 talks.

\.My DOJO's MASTE2 chewe2 m2 ou2

"Hiyah! I respect my MASTER at the

Hiyah!"

entries.original:
"Oh\. [player]!
I've been looking for you!

It's me, one of the ever-present
AIDES to PROF. OAK.

If your POKéDEX has complete data
on twenty species, I'm supposed to
give you a reward from PROF. OAK.

He entrusted me with this
EVERSTONE.

So, [player], let me ask you.

Have you gathered data on at least
twenty kinds of POKéMON?"

"Making POKéMON evolve certainly
can add to the POKéDEX.

However, at times, you may not
want a certain POKéMON to evolve.

In that case, give the EVERSTONE
to that POKéMON.

It will prevent evolution according
to the PROFESSOR."

entries.original:
"Bravo!

Bravo, indeed!
What an astounding battle!

used techniques!

The clash of power upon power!

It was sheer magnificence!"

I2 wa2 shee2 magnificence!"

"Too bad!

However, that disappointment is

motivate you to seek greatness.

Forget not this disappointment

"Hah? What is this GAME CORNER?

Thes2 island2 ar2 confusing\."

"Hey, but listen! I'm begging you,

entries.translated:
"[player] receive2 a MOO2 STON2

entries.original:
"LOSTELLE: Hi, [player]!

entries.original: "Rare rocks and gems are displayed."
entries.translated: "Rar2 rock2 an2 gem2 ar2 displayed."

"Let's crush BERRIES!

\.That'd b2 wastin2 BERRIES?

I've hear2 tha2 she's on2 coo2

entries.original:
"Urrrrrrrrgggghhhh\.
Kwaaaaah!

\.It's useless! I can't make this

"Urrrrrrrrgggghhhh\.
Kwaaaaah!

\.It's useless! I can't mak2 thi2

Mayb2 I reall2 don't hav2 an2

entries.original:
"I bought this house because I

entries.original:
"I'm the DAY-CARE LADY.

"Oh, fine, then.

"Which POKéMON should we raise for

entries.original:

Com2 again."

entries.original: "My husband was looking for you."
entries.translated: "M2 husban2 wa2 lookin2 fo2 you."

entries.original:
"By level, your [buffer1] has

entries.translated:

"Ah, it's you!

Goo2 t2 se2 you.

You2 POKéMON ca2 onl2 b2 doin2

entries.translated: "Wil2 yo2 tak2 you2 POKéMON back?"

"If you want your [buffer1] back,

entries.original: "You don't have enough money\."

entries.original:
"Perfect!

"Perfect!
Here's you2 POKéMON."

entries.original:
"There's a rare kind of ICE POKéMON

entries.original:
"Oh? A POKéMON EGG?
\.I have no idea.

\.Oh, wait. The DAY-CARE people

\.I hav2 n2 idea.

\.Oh, wait. Th2 DAY-CARE peopl2

"What's this?

The new POKéMON JOURNAL hasn't

entries.translated:
"What's this?

Th2 ne2 POKéMON JOURNA2 hasn't
arrive2 o2 thi2 island?"

entries.original:
"There! Boing!
You're awfully heavy!"
entries.translated:
"There! Boing!
You're awfull2 heavy!"

entries.original:
"LORELEI: There's something weighing
heavily on my mind.

If anything were to happen on
the island where I was born\.

I wouldn't know about it if I were
in the POKéMON LEAGUE.

I wonder if that would make me
irresponsible to my home\."

"LORELEI: There's somethin2 weighin2

I2 anythin2 wer2 t2 happe2 o2
th2 islan2 wher2 I wa2 born\.

I wouldn't kno2 abou2 i2 i2 I wer2
i2 th2 POKéMON LEAGUE.

I wonde2 i2 tha2 woul2 mak2 m2
irresponsibl2 t2 m2 home\."

entries.original:
"LORELEI: So, you managed to solve
all the problems here?

That's wonderful.

That means there isn't any reason
for me to be here all the time.

Thank you\.

I'll return to the POKéMON LEAGUE

entries.translated:
"LORELEI: So, yo2 manage2 t2 solv2
al2 th2 problem2 here?

That's wonderful.

Tha2 mean2 ther2 isn't an2 reaso2

Than2 you\.

I'll retur2 t2 th2 POKéMON LEAGU2

entries.original:
"I don't know what will happen in
the future, but\.

I will do what I can here and now.
That's all I can do."
entries.translated:
"I don't kno2 wha2 wil2 happe2 i2
th2 future, but\.

I wil2 d2 wha2 I ca2 her2 an2 now.
That's al2 I ca2 do."

entries.original: "Stuffed POKéMON dolls galore!"
entries.translated: "Stuffe2 POKéMON doll2 galore!"

entries.original:
"The SEVII ISLANDS are in a warm

But there is one exception you

The ICEFALL CAVE is frigid because
of the POKéMON that live in it."

"Th2 SEVI2 ISLAND2 ar2 i2 a war2

Bu2 ther2 i2 on2 exceptio2 yo2
nee2 t2 kno2 about.

Th2 ICEFAL2 CAV2 i2 frigi2 becaus2
o2 th2 POKéMON tha2 liv2 i2 it."

entries.original:
"I'm on my way to prepare a meal

entries.translated:

fo2 a certai2 high-society person."

entries.original:
"You're on a quest to catch every

\.How incredible. Please tell me if

"You're o2 a ques2 t2 catc2 ever2

\.How incredible. Pleas2 tel2 m2 i2

entries.original:
"Don't worry about buying anything

\.That's what my husband said when

I'm not sure if I can count on him

"Don't worr2 abou2 buyin2 anythin2

\.That's wha2 m2 husban2 sai2 whe2

I'm no2 sur2 i2 I ca2 coun2 o2 hi2

entries.original:
"That MEADOW has belonged to our

It would be preferable to having

"Tha2 MEADO2 ha2 belonge2 t2 ou2

I shoul2 hav2 ha2 a gian2 mansio2

I2 woul2 b2 preferabl2 t2 havin2

entries.original:
"[rival]: Hey, [player]!
How's your POKéDEX filling up?

It looks like it's impossible to get
all the POKéMON by hanging around
just these parts.

Maybe there are POKéMON we don't
know about somewhere far away\.

\. \. \.  \. \. \.  \. \. \.

Well, if I can't do it, there's no
way for you to get it done.

I'm not going to get all desperate
over this.

I'll keep collecting POKéMON at my
own pace while I train them.

That's what I'll do.
So there's no point staying here.
I may as well leave for home.

That's that, then!
Smell ya later!"
entries.translated:
"[rival]: Hey, [player]!
How's you2 POKéDEX fillin2 up?

I2 look2 lik2 it's impossibl2 t2 ge2
al2 th2 POKéMON b2 hangin2 aroun2
jus2 thes2 parts.

Mayb2 ther2 ar2 POKéMON w2 don't
kno2 abou2 somewher2 fa2 away\.

\. \. \.  \. \. \.  \. \. \.

Well, i2 I can't d2 it, there's n2
wa2 fo2 yo2 t2 ge2 i2 done.

I'm no2 goin2 t2 ge2 al2 desperat2
ove2 this.

I'll kee2 collectin2 POKéMON a2 m2
ow2 pac2 whil2 I trai2 them.

That's wha2 I'll do.
S2 there's n2 poin2 stayin2 here.
I ma2 a2 wel2 leav2 fo2 home.

That's that, then!
Smel2 y2 later!"

entries.original:
"For ten years, I've searched for
RUINS.

No, make that twenty years.

I get this feeling that there's
something hidden on this island."
entries.translated:
"Fo2 te2 years, I've searche2 fo2
RUINS.

No, mak2 tha2 twent2 years.

I ge2 thi2 feelin2 tha2 there's
somethin2 hidde2 o2 thi2 island."

entries.original:
"You know of POKéMON that evolve

But did you know that there are

Some POKéMON evolve only when

"Yo2 kno2 o2 POKéMON tha2 evolv2

Bu2 di2 yo2 kno2 tha2 ther2 ar2
stil2 others?

Som2 POKéMON evolv2 onl2 whe2

entries.original:
"There's nothing that young people'd

But, this is a good place in terms

Relax and enjoy your stay."
entries.translated:
"There's nothin2 tha2 youn2 people'd
fin2 excitin2 her2 o2 thi2 island.

But, thi2 i2 a goo2 plac2 i2 term2
o2 natur2 an2 history.

Rela2 an2 enjo2 you2 stay."

entries.original:
"I should buy some MAIL and write

entries.translated:
"I shoul2 bu2 som2 MAI2 an2 writ2
hi2 a letter\."

entries.original:
"SELPHY: Oh?
Do I know you from somewhere?

Oh, but that doesn't matter.

I am exquisitely bored.
Please, hear my wish."
entries.translated:
"SELPHY: Oh?
D2 I kno2 yo2 fro2 somewhere?

Oh, bu2 tha2 doesn't matter.

I a2 exquisitel2 bored.
Please, hea2 m2 wish."

entries.original:
"I wish to see a POKéMON.
A darling [buffer1].

I want to see one right away.
Please, make my wish come true."
entries.translated:
"I wis2 t2 se2 a POKéMON.
A darlin2 [buffer1].

I wan2 t2 se2 on2 righ2 away.
Please, mak2 m2 wis2 com2 true."

entries.original:
"SELPHY: Oh, I'm tired of this.

entries.original:
"I got my VOLTORB at the abandoned
POWER PLANT."
entries.translated:
"I go2 m2 VOLTOR2 a2 th2 abandone2
POWE2 PLANT."

entries.original: "The slope makes it hard to steer."
entries.translated: "Th2 slop2 make2 i2 har2 t2 steer."

entries.original: "I need to catch a few z's!"
entries.translated: "I nee2 t2 catc2 a fe2 z's!"

entries.original:
"You can find good stuff lying
around on CYCLING ROAD.

There's good money in picking them
up and selling them."
entries.translated:
"Yo2 ca2 fin2 goo2 stuf2 lyin2
aroun2 o2 CYCLIN2 ROAD.

There's goo2 mone2 i2 pickin2 the2
u2 an2 sellin2 them."

entries.original:
"I could belly-bump you outta
here!"
entries.translated:
"I coul2 belly-bump yo2 outt2
here!"

entries.original:
"Maybe some POKéMON need element
STONES to evolve."
entries.translated:
"Mayb2 som2 POKéMON nee2 elemen2
STONE2 t2 evolve."

entries.original: "I'm sure I lost weight there!"
entries.translated: "I'm sur2 I los2 weigh2 there!"

entries.original: "Be ready to fight for your beliefs!"
entries.translated: "B2 read2 t2 figh2 fo2 you2 beliefs!"

entries.original: "I love racing downhill!"
entries.translated: "I lov2 racin2 downhill!"

entries.original: "I wish I had a BIKE!"
entries.translated: "I wis2 I ha2 a BIKE!"

entries.original:
"I collect sea POKéMON on weekends
because the sea is so close."
entries.translated:
"I collec2 se2 POKéMON o2 weekend2
becaus2 th2 se2 i2 s2 close."

entries.original:
"This is my fave area for catching
POKéMON."
entries.translated:
"Thi2 i2 m2 fav2 are2 fo2 catchin2
POKéMON."

entries.original:
"Thanks, kid!
I'm ready for a swim."
entries.translated:
"Thanks, kid!
I'm read2 fo2 a swim."

entries.original:
"Watch out for TENTACOOL.
They sting so painfully."
entries.translated:
"Watc2 ou2 fo2 TENTACOOL.
The2 stin2 s2 painfully."

entries.original:
"I can beat even marine POKéMON
at swimming."
entries.translated:
"I ca2 bea2 eve2 marin2 POKéMON
a2 swimming."

entries.original:
"I see a couple of islands over
yonder!"
entries.translated:
"I se2 a coupl2 o2 island2 ove2
yonder!"

entries.original:
"I guess you have to fish for sea
POKéMON."
entries.translated:
"I gues2 yo2 hav2 t2 fis2 fo2 se2
POKéMON."

entries.original:
"I'm looking at the sea to forget
the bad thing that happened!"
entries.translated:
"I'm lookin2 a2 th2 se2 t2 forge2
th2 ba2 thin2 tha2 happened!"

entries.original:
"M-my legs! They cramped up!
Glub, glub\."
entries.translated:
"M-my legs! The2 crampe2 up!
Glub, glub\."

entries.original:
"It's still a long way to go to
SEAFOAM ISLANDS\.

I want to go back to FUCHSIA\."
entries.translated:
"It's stil2 a lon2 wa2 t2 g2 t2
SEAFOA2 ISLANDS\.

I wan2 t2 g2 bac2 t2 FUCHSIA\."

entries.original:
"My boyfriend wanted to swim to
SEAFOAM ISLANDS."
entries.translated:
"M2 boyfrien2 wante2 t2 swi2 t2
SEAFOA2 ISLANDS."

entries.original:
"If I were to ride a POKéMON on
the sea, I'd like a LAPRAS.

LAPRAS is so big, I bet it
would keep me dry on water."
entries.translated:
"I2 I wer2 t2 rid2 a POKéMON o2
th2 sea, I'd lik2 a LAPRAS.

LAPRA2 i2 s2 big, I be2 i2
woul2 kee2 m2 dr2 o2 water."

entries.original:
"LIA: Do you have a younger
brother?

I hope you're teaching him all
sorts of things."
entries.translated:
"LIA: D2 yo2 hav2 a younge2
brother?

I hop2 you're teachin2 hi2 al2
sort2 o2 things."

entries.original:
"LUC: My big sis is strong and nice.
I think she's awesome!"
entries.translated:
"LUC: M2 bi2 si2 i2 stron2 an2 nice.
I thin2 she's awesome!"

entries.original:
"I wish I could ride my POKéMON.
I bet you're not tired."
entries.translated:
"I wis2 I coul2 rid2 m2 POKéMON.
I be2 you're no2 tired."

entries.original:
"I should've been buffing up my
POKéMON, not me!"
entries.translated:
"I should've bee2 buffin2 u2 m2
POKéMON, no2 me!"

entries.original: "Riding a POKéMON sure looks fun!"
entries.translated: "Ridin2 a POKéMON sur2 look2 fun!"

entries.original: "Want to float with me?"
entries.translated: "Wan2 t2 floa2 wit2 me?"

entries.original:
"Will my pearls grow bigger inside
CLOYSTER?"
entries.translated:
"Wil2 m2 pearl2 gro2 bigge2 insid2
CLOYSTER?"

entries.original:
"CINNABAR is a volcanic island.

I heard it rose out of the sea
when a volcano erupted."
entries.translated:
"CINNABA2 i2 a volcani2 island.

I hear2 i2 ros2 ou2 o2 th2 se2
whe2 a volcan2 erupted."

entries.original:
"There's a huge cavern underneath
this island."
entries.translated:
"There's a hug2 caver2 underneat2
thi2 island."

entries.original:
"My birds are exhausted.
They can't FLY me back!"
entries.translated:
"M2 bird2 ar2 exhausted.
The2 can't FL2 m2 back!"

entries.original:
"POKéMON have taken over an
abandoned mansion on CINNABAR.

They call it the POKéMON MANSION
now."
entries.translated:
"POKéMON hav2 take2 ove2 a2
abandone2 mansio2 o2 CINNABAR.

The2 cal2 i2 th2 POKéMON MANSIO2
now."

entries.original:
"SEAFOAM used to be a single island
in the distant past."
entries.translated:
"SEAFOA2 use2 t2 b2 a singl2 islan2
i2 th2 distan2 past."

entries.original:
"I can't catch anything good.
Not one good POKéMON to be had!"
entries.translated:
"I can't catc2 anythin2 good.
No2 on2 goo2 POKéMON t2 b2 had!"

entries.original:
"Sheesh, I haven't caught a thing.
Could this place actually be a
giant pool or something?"
entries.translated:
"Sheesh, I haven't caugh2 a thing.
Coul2 thi2 plac2 actuall2 b2 a
gian2 poo2 o2 something?"

entries.original: "I seem to only catch MAGIKARP!"
entries.translated: "I see2 t2 onl2 catc2 MAGIKARP!"

entries.original:
"Oh wait!
I got a bite! Yeah!"
entries.translated:
"O2 wait!
I go2 a bite! Yeah!"

entries.original:
"The sea is great and all, but I
like the mountains, too."
entries.translated:
"Th2 se2 i2 grea2 an2 all, bu2 I
lik2 th2 mountains, too."

entries.original: "Where'd you catch your POKéMON?"
entries.translated: "Where'd yo2 catc2 you2 POKéMON?"

entries.original:
"I'm beat! But, I still have the
bike race and marathon left!"
entries.translated:
"I'm beat! But, I stil2 hav2 th2
bik2 rac2 an2 maratho2 left!"

entries.original: "I'm sunburnt to a crisp!"
entries.translated: "I'm sunburn2 t2 a crisp!"

entries.original:
"LIL: I'm tired.
Can't we go home already?"
entries.translated:
"LIL: I'm tired.
Can't w2 g2 hom2 already?"

entries.original:
"IAN: Come on, Sis!

You're not going to lose weight
like this!"
entries.translated:
"IAN: Com2 on, Sis!

You're no2 goin2 t2 los2 weigh2
lik2 this!"

entries.original:
"Please don't splash my face!
You'll ruin the makeup."
entries.translated:
"Pleas2 don't splas2 m2 face!
You'll rui2 th2 makeup."

entries.original:
"I like that cap you have.
Maybe I should wear one, too\."
entries.translated:
"I lik2 tha2 ca2 yo2 have.
Mayb2 I shoul2 wea2 one, too\."

entries.original:
"The sky is immense around these
parts."
entries.translated:
"Th2 sk2 i2 immens2 aroun2 thes2
parts."

entries.original:
"Instead of using SURF all the time,
you should swim some."
entries.translated:
"Instea2 o2 usin2 SUR2 al2 th2 time,
yo2 shoul2 swi2 some."

entries.original:
"Not only did I lose, the big one
got away from me, too!"
entries.translated:
"No2 onl2 di2 I lose, th2 bi2 on2
go2 awa2 fro2 me, too!"

entries.original:
"It's clear that you're skilled.
I like you!"
entries.translated:
"It's clea2 tha2 you're skilled.
I lik2 you!"

entries.original: "I'll train even harder from now on!"
entries.translated: "I'll trai2 eve2 harde2 fro2 no2 on!"

entries.original:
"I lost because I'm pooped from all
the running I did\."
entries.translated:
"I los2 becaus2 I'm poope2 fro2 al2
th2 runnin2 I did\."

entries.original:
"Even martial artists are becoming
fashion conscious these days\."
entries.translated:
"Eve2 martia2 artist2 ar2 becomin2
fashio2 consciou2 thes2 days\."

entries.original:
"The water in volcanic regions is
delicious."
entries.translated:
"Th2 wate2 i2 volcani2 region2 i2
delicious."

entries.original:
"What should I do?
I feel famished again."
entries.translated:
"Wha2 shoul2 I do?
I fee2 famishe2 again."

entries.original:
"KIA: How could there be anyone
better than my big brother?"
entries.translated:
"KIA: Ho2 coul2 ther2 b2 anyon2
bette2 tha2 m2 bi2 brother?"

entries.original:
"MIK: How could my combination
with KIA fail?"
entries.translated:
"MIK: Ho2 coul2 m2 combinatio2
wit2 KI2 fail?"

entries.original:
"The sea is pleasantly warm in these
parts."
entries.translated:
"Th2 se2 i2 pleasantl2 war2 i2 thes2
parts."

entries.original:
"Perhaps that reek is your sweaty
POKéMON's body odor\."
entries.translated:
"Perhap2 tha2 ree2 i2 you2 sweat2
POKéMON's bod2 odor\."

entries.original:
"If you keep going this way, you'll
eventually reach BERRY FOREST."
entries.translated:
"I2 yo2 kee2 goin2 thi2 way, you'll
eventuall2 reac2 BERR2 FOREST."

entries.original:
"This year, I'm going to finally
learn how to swim!"
entries.translated:
"Thi2 year, I'm goin2 t2 finall2
lear2 ho2 t2 swim!"

entries.original:
"Did I just win?
Or did I lose?"
entries.translated:
"Di2 I jus2 win?
O2 di2 I lose?"

entries.original:
"A POKéMON bit through my 
swimsuit.

I can't get out of the water!"
entries.translated:
"A POKéMON bi2 throug2 m2 
swimsuit.

I can't ge2 ou2 o2 th2 water!"

entries.original:
"JOY: Wasn't that fun?
I hope we can battle again!"
entries.translated:
"JOY: Wasn't tha2 fun?
I hop2 w2 ca2 battl2 again!"

entries.original: "MEG: JOY, wasn't that fun?"
entries.translated: "MEG: JOY, wasn't tha2 fun?"

entries.original:
"Uh-oh, my paint tubes have
scattered everywhere!"
entries.translated:
"Uh-oh, m2 pain2 tube2 hav2
scattere2 everywhere!"

entries.original:
"GILLIAN?
Please tilt your head slightly\.
There! That's the look I want!"
entries.translated:
"GILLIAN?
Pleas2 til2 you2 hea2 slightly\.
There! That's th2 loo2 I want!"

entries.original:
"The sky and the sea\.
They are so fickle.

Their changing expressions make
them difficult to capture."
entries.translated:
"Th2 sk2 an2 th2 sea\.
The2 ar2 s2 fickle.

Thei2 changin2 expression2 mak2
the2 difficul2 t2 capture."

entries.original:
"I find it pleasurable to leisurely
battle in the gentle sea breeze."
entries.translated:
"I fin2 i2 pleasurabl2 t2 leisurel2
battl2 i2 th2 gentl2 se2 breeze."

entries.original:
"A pool would be nice, but I must
say, a sun-room may be sublime."
entries.translated:
"A poo2 woul2 b2 nice, bu2 I mus2
say, a sun-room ma2 b2 sublime."

entries.original:
"When I run with the wind, it feels
like I could fly!"
entries.translated:
"Whe2 I ru2 wit2 th2 wind, i2 feel2
lik2 I coul2 fly!"

entries.original:
"Getting so serious over this\.
How nonsensical."
entries.translated:
"Gettin2 s2 seriou2 ove2 this\.
Ho2 nonsensical."

entries.original:
"You know, I think you have the
talent to be a good BREEDER."
entries.translated:
"Yo2 know, I thin2 yo2 hav2 th2
talen2 t2 b2 a goo2 BREEDER."

entries.original:
"You can fly to FOUR ISLAND from
here."
entries.translated:
"Yo2 ca2 fl2 t2 FOU2 ISLAN2 fro2
here."

entries.original:
"There was a really somber guy
over that way."
entries.translated:
"Ther2 wa2 a reall2 sombe2 gu2
ove2 tha2 way."

entries.original:
"It fills me with happiness when
bird POKéMON beg playfully\."
entries.translated:
"I2 fill2 m2 wit2 happines2 whe2
bir2 POKéMON be2 playfully\."

entries.original:
"I can't very well go home without
catching something, though."
entries.translated:
"I can't ver2 wel2 g2 hom2 withou2
catchin2 something, though."

entries.original:
"I'm only at the halfway point\.
I'm beat\."
entries.translated:
"I'm onl2 a2 th2 halfwa2 point\.
I'm beat\."

entries.original:
"Are you headed for the island up
past here?

I didn't see anything interesting
there."
entries.translated:
"Ar2 yo2 heade2 fo2 th2 islan2 u2
pas2 here?

I didn't se2 anythin2 interestin2
there."

entries.original:
"AVA: You know, I do prefer the
sea over any pool."
entries.translated:
"AVA: Yo2 know, I d2 prefe2 th2
se2 ove2 an2 pool."

entries.original:
"GEB: I'm hanging onto my sister
because I can't touch the bottom."
entries.translated:
"GEB: I'm hangin2 ont2 m2 siste2
becaus2 I can't touc2 th2 bottom."

entries.original:
"I am so scatterbrained!

I need to focus so I can TELEPORT
properly to my house!"
entries.translated:
"I a2 s2 scatterbrained!

I nee2 t2 focu2 s2 I ca2 TELEPOR2
properl2 t2 m2 house!"

entries.original:
"I want to go to the woods over
there, but\.

There are lots of BUG POKéMON.
They scare me a little."
entries.translated:
"I wan2 t2 g2 t2 th2 wood2 ove2
there, but\.

Ther2 ar2 lot2 o2 BU2 POKéMON.
The2 scar2 m2 a little."

entries.original:
"As a performer, I don't want people
to know about the effort I put in."
entries.translated:
"A2 a performer, I don't wan2 peopl2
t2 kno2 abou2 th2 effor2 I pu2 in."

entries.original:
"I couldn't lift the stigma of being
a SWIMMER\."
entries.translated:
"I couldn't lif2 th2 stigm2 o2 bein2
a SWIMMER\."

entries.original:
"When I can't be with my boyfriend,
I spend time with the POKéMON he
gave me."
entries.translated:
"Whe2 I can't b2 wit2 m2 boyfriend,
I spen2 tim2 wit2 th2 POKéMON h2
gav2 me."

entries.original:
"MIU: It makes me all sad inside
when we lose\."
entries.translated:
"MIU: I2 make2 m2 al2 sa2 insid2
whe2 w2 lose\."

entries.original:
"MIA: Ohh\.
I'm sorry, my POKéMON\."
entries.translated:
"MIA: Ohh\.
I'm sorry, m2 POKéMON\."

entries.original:
"Aren't there any mountains around
these parts?"
entries.translated:
"Aren't ther2 an2 mountain2 aroun2
thes2 parts?"

entries.original:
"I suggest to you that you, too,
give a thought to the secrets and
mysteries of our world once a day."
entries.translated:
"I sugges2 t2 yo2 tha2 you, too,
giv2 a though2 t2 th2 secret2 an2
mysterie2 o2 ou2 worl2 onc2 a day."

entries.original:
"There are several ruins on the
SEVII ISLANDS.

The majority of them date back
a long way."
entries.translated:
"Ther2 ar2 severa2 ruin2 o2 th2
SEVI2 ISLANDS.

Th2 majorit2 o2 the2 dat2 bac2
a lon2 way."

entries.original:
"Those ruins over there\.

I haven't had any luck in finding
how I can get inside."
entries.translated:
"Thos2 ruin2 ove2 there\.

I haven't ha2 an2 luc2 i2 findin2
ho2 I ca2 ge2 inside."

entries.original: "Experience the joy of climbing!"
entries.translated: "Experienc2 th2 jo2 o2 climbing!"

entries.original:
"The door to the ruins\.
It has these strange patterns
engraved on the outside.

I don't know what they mean,
though."
entries.translated:
"Th2 doo2 t2 th2 ruins\.
I2 ha2 thes2 strang2 pattern2
engrave2 o2 th2 outside.

I don't kno2 wha2 the2 mean,
though."

entries.original:
"In your future, I sense that you
will meet many others.

I think you will be linked to each
other by a strange power."
entries.translated:
"I2 you2 future, I sens2 tha2 yo2
wil2 mee2 man2 others.

I thin2 yo2 wil2 b2 linke2 t2 eac2
othe2 b2 a strang2 power."

entries.original:
"Somewhere on this island, peculiar
POKéMON are sleeping.

Could it be that they're waiting
for you?"
entries.translated:
"Somewher2 o2 thi2 island, peculia2
POKéMON ar2 sleeping.

Coul2 i2 b2 tha2 they're waitin2
fo2 you?"

entries.original:
"What's that?
I don't act the way I look?

Heh, that's a part of my strategy!"
entries.translated:
"What's that?
I don't ac2 th2 wa2 I look?

Heh, that's a par2 o2 m2 strategy!"

entries.original:
"EVE: I'm going to work harder with
JON."
entries.translated:
"EVE: I'm goin2 t2 wor2 harde2 wit2
JON."

entries.original:
"JON: When I'm with EVE, I feel
giddy whether I win or lose.

It's magical!"
entries.translated:
"JON: Whe2 I'm wit2 EVE, I fee2
gidd2 whethe2 I wi2 o2 lose.

It's magical!"

entries.original:
"Lalalah\.
My POKéMON, I send them out,
all the girls scream and shout!"
entries.translated:
"Lalalah\.
M2 POKéMON, I sen2 the2 out,
al2 th2 girl2 screa2 an2 shout!"

entries.original:
"TRAINERS like you from cities,
they sure are tough.

You'll be headed for the TOWER,
won't you?"
entries.translated:
"TRAINER2 lik2 yo2 fro2 cities,
the2 sur2 ar2 tough.

You'll b2 heade2 fo2 th2 TOWER,
won't you?"

entries.original:
"If you treat your POKéMON with
kindness, they'll understand."
entries.translated:
"I2 yo2 trea2 you2 POKéMON wit2
kindness, they'll understand."

entries.original:
"The way I am now, I may have to
hold off on TRAINER TOWER\."
entries.translated:
"Th2 wa2 I a2 now, I ma2 hav2 t2
hol2 of2 o2 TRAINE2 TOWER\."

entries.original:
"You see them every so often,
TRAINERS with awesome POKéMON
who have no idea what to do.

Before training POKéMON, TRAINERS
themselves need to grow up."
entries.translated:
"Yo2 se2 the2 ever2 s2 often,
TRAINER2 wit2 awesom2 POKéMON
wh2 hav2 n2 ide2 wha2 t2 do.

Befor2 trainin2 POKéMON, TRAINER2
themselve2 nee2 t2 gro2 up."

entries.original:
"From far out among the stars, our
planet is just a drop of water.

But we want to protect that drop
of water for everyone."
entries.translated:
"Fro2 fa2 ou2 amon2 th2 stars, ou2
plane2 i2 jus2 a dro2 o2 water.

Bu2 w2 wan2 t2 protec2 tha2 dro2
o2 wate2 fo2 everyone."

entries.original:
"Your mom bought those snazzy
RUNNING SHOES for you?

She must adore you."
entries.translated:
"You2 mo2 bough2 thos2 snazz2
RUNNIN2 SHOE2 fo2 you?

Sh2 mus2 ador2 you."

entries.original:
"The way you battle has given me
a lot of useful data.

Thanks so much!"
entries.translated:
"Th2 wa2 yo2 battl2 ha2 give2 m2
a lo2 o2 usefu2 data.

Thank2 s2 much!"

entries.original:
"For some reason, I get furious
over the slightest thing.

I'll calm myself by breathing
deeply."
entries.translated:
"Fo2 som2 reason, I ge2 furiou2
ove2 th2 slightes2 thing.

I'll cal2 mysel2 b2 breathin2
deeply."

entries.original:
"LEX: I think it was a good
experience for NYA.

You have my gratitude."
entries.translated:
"LEX: I thin2 i2 wa2 a goo2
experienc2 fo2 NYA.

Yo2 hav2 m2 gratitude."

entries.original:
"NYA: I think I'm going to need
much more seasoning and tutoring
under LEX\.

\.So, LEX, please, may I stay with
you like this?"
entries.translated:
"NYA: I thin2 I'm goin2 t2 nee2
muc2 mor2 seasonin2 an2 tutorin2
unde2 LEX\.

\.So, LEX, please, ma2 I sta2 wit2
yo2 lik2 this?"

entries.original:
"The TANOBY RUINS date back at
least 1,500 years.

But it's a baffling mystery as to
why it was built in the first place."
entries.translated:
"Th2 TANOB2 RUIN2 dat2 bac2 a2
leas2 1,500 years.

Bu2 it's a bafflin2 myster2 a2 t2
wh2 i2 wa2 buil2 i2 th2 firs2 place."

entries.original:
"I hear there are other ruins like
the one here.

Might they be the resting places
of other mystic POKéMON?"
entries.translated:
"I hea2 ther2 ar2 othe2 ruin2 lik2
th2 on2 here.

Migh2 the2 b2 th2 restin2 place2
o2 othe2 mysti2 POKéMON?"

entries.original:
"I said that I wanted to paint an
old building.

So CLIFFORD brought me here."
entries.translated:
"I sai2 tha2 I wante2 t2 pain2 a2
ol2 building.

S2 CLIFFOR2 brough2 m2 here."

entries.original:
"Ah, so you are studying POKéMON
on your own\.

Yes, you certainly are quite the
extraordinary person, indeed."
entries.translated:
"Ah, s2 yo2 ar2 studyin2 POKéMON
o2 you2 own\.

Yes, yo2 certainl2 ar2 quit2 th2
extraordinar2 person, indeed."

entries.original:
"POKéMON JOURNAL

Special Feature: PROF. OAK,
the POKéMON Researcher!

PROF. OAK reportedly lives with his
grandchildren DAISY and [rival]."
entries.translated:
"POKéMON JOURNA2

Specia2 Feature: PROF. OAK,
th2 POKéMON Researcher!

PROF. OA2 reportedl2 live2 wit2 hi2
grandchildre2 DAIS2 an2 [rival]."

entries.original:
"This is a POKéMON JOURNAL from
years ago\.

POKéMON JOURNAL
CONTEST Special!

The Spring POKéMON CONTEST's
Grand Champion is DAISY OAK of
PALLET TOWN!"
entries.translated:
"Thi2 i2 a POKéMON JOURNA2 fro2
year2 ago\.

POKéMON JOURNA2
CONTES2 Special!

Th2 Sprin2 POKéMON CONTEST's
Gran2 Champio2 i2 DAIS2 OA2 o2
PALLE2 TOWN!"

entries.original:
"Oh, wow, that's the BOULDERBADGE!
You got it from BROCK, didn't you?

BROCK is cool. He's not just tough.
People like and respect him.

I want to become a GYM LEADER
like him."
entries.translated:
"Oh, wow, that's th2 BOULDERBADGE!
Yo2 go2 i2 fro2 BROCK, didn't you?

BROC2 i2 cool. He's no2 jus2 tough.
Peopl2 lik2 an2 respec2 him.

I wan2 t2 becom2 a GY2 LEADE2
lik2 him."

entries.original:
"Hi, I'm excavating for fossils here
under MT. MOON.

Sometimes, BROCK of PEWTER GYM
lends me a hand."
entries.translated:
"Hi, I'm excavatin2 fo2 fossil2 her2
unde2 MT. MOON.

Sometimes, BROC2 o2 PEWTE2 GY2
lend2 m2 a hand."

entries.original:
"POKéMON JOURNAL

Special Feature: PEWTER GYM
LEADER BROCK!

BROCK rarely laughs, but is said to

entries.original:
"Hello!

This must be your first time
up here.

I'll show you how the Wireless
Communication System works.

First, I need to show you this
floor of our POKéMON CENTER.

Right this way, please."

entries.original:
"On the top floor, there are two
rooms.

First, the room on the left.
It's the UNION ROOM.

You may link up with TRAINERS
around you who have also entered
the UNION ROOM.

With them, you may do things like
chat, battle, and trade.

Second, the room on the right is
the DIRECT CORNER.

You may trade or battle POKéMON
with your friends in this room.

If the Wireless Adapter isn't
connected, you may still link up
using a GBA Game Link cable.

If that is the case, you must go
to the DIRECT CORNER.

I hope you enjoy the Wireless 
Communication System."

entries.original:
"There are three Battle Modes.

SINGLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.

DOUBLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with two or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER will send out two
POKéMON in battle at a time.

MULTI BATTLE is for four TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.

Each TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time."

POKéMON i2 battl2 a2 a time.

entries.original:
"Let me explain how the POKéMON
WIRELESS CLUB works.

On this, the top floor, there are
two rooms.

First, the room on the left.
It's the UNION ROOM.

You may link up with TRAINERS
around you who have also entered
the UNION ROOM.

With them, you may do things like
chat, battle, and trade.

Second, the room on the right is
the DIRECT CORNER.

You may trade or battle POKéMON
with your friends in this room.

Sometimes, you may not be able to
find your friends in the UNION ROOM
or the DIRECT CORNER.

In that case, please move closer
to your friends.

If the Wireless Adapter isn't
connected, you may still link up
using a GBA Game Link cable.

If that is the case, you must go
to the DIRECT CORNER.

I hope you enjoy the Wireless 
Communication System."

"Le2 m2 explai2 ho2 th2 POKéMON

Communicatio2 System."

entries.original:
"\qoPOKéMON JUMP\qc

VINE WHIP rope with the A Button.

Only mini POKéMON around 28 inches
or less may participate.

POKéMON that only swim, burrow, or
fly are not good at jumping.

As a result, those POKéMON may not
participate.

Good things happen if everyone
jumps in time."

the worth of MEGA PUNCH."

"You'll b2 bac2 whe2 yo2 understan2
th2 wort2 o2 MEG2 PUNCH."

entries.original:
"Now, we are comrades in the way of

You should go before you're seen

Yo2 shoul2 g2 befor2 you're see2

entries.original:
"A kick of brutal ferocity!

Packed with destructive power!

When you get right down to it,
MEGA KICK is the ultimate attack!
Don't you agree?

Okay!
I'll teach it to your POKéMON!"

"A kic2 o2 bruta2 ferocity!

Packe2 wit2 destructiv2 power!

Whe2 yo2 ge2 righ2 dow2 t2 it,
MEG2 KIC2 i2 th2 ultimat2 attack!
Don't yo2 agree?

Okay!
I'll teac2 i2 t2 you2 POKéMON!"

entries.original:
"All right!
Which POKéMON wants to learn it?"
entries.translated:
"Al2 right!
Whic2 POKéMON want2 t2 lear2 it?"

entries.original:
"You'll come crawling back when you
realize the value of MEGA KICK."
entries.translated:
"You'll com2 crawlin2 bac2 whe2 yo2
realiz2 th2 valu2 o2 MEG2 KICK."

entries.original:
"Now, we are soul mates in the way
of kicking!

You should run before you're seen
by the deluded nitwit who trains

Yo2 shoul2 ru2 befor2 you're see2

entries.original:
"Yawn!
I must have dozed off in the sun.

I had this weird dream about
a DROWZEE eating my dream.

And\.
I learned how to eat dreams\.

Oogh, this is too spooky!

Let me teach it to a POKéMON so
I can forget about it!"

"Yawn!
I mus2 hav2 doze2 of2 i2 th2 sun.

I ha2 thi2 weir2 drea2 abou2
a DROWZE2 eatin2 m2 dream.

And\.

Oogh, thi2 i2 to2 spooky!

Le2 m2 teac2 i2 t2 a POKéMON s2
I ca2 forge2 abou2 it!"

entries.original:
"Hello, there!

I've seen you about, but I never
had a chance to chat.

It must be good luck that brought
us together finally.

I'd like to celebrate by teaching
you the move SOFTBOILED."
entries.translated:
"Hello, there!

I've see2 yo2 about, bu2 I neve2
ha2 a chanc2 t2 chat.

I2 mus2 b2 goo2 luc2 tha2 brough2
u2 togethe2 finally.

I'd lik2 t2 celebrat2 b2 teachin2
yo2 th2 mov2 SOFTBOILED."

entries.original:
"So, who's the POKéMON that gets
the chance to learn SOFTBOILED?"
entries.translated:
"So, who's th2 POKéMON tha2 get2
th2 chanc2 t2 lear2 SOFTBOILED?"

entries.original:
"I'll always be keeping an eye out
for you.

I hope we can chat again."
entries.translated:
"I'll alway2 b2 keepin2 a2 ey2 ou2
fo2 you.

I hop2 w2 ca2 cha2 again."

entries.original: "I wish you the best of luck!"
entries.translated: "I wis2 yo2 th2 bes2 o2 luck!"

entries.original:
"Aww, I wish I was a KANGASKHAN
baby.

I'd love to be a substitute for the
baby\.

And snuggle in the mother
KANGASKHAN's belly pouch.

But only POKéMON can use the
technique SUBSTITUTE\.

Want me to teach SUBSTITUTE to
one of your POKéMON?"

"Aww, I wis2 I wa2 a KANGASKHA2
baby.

I'd lov2 t2 b2 a substitut2 fo2 th2
baby\.

An2 snuggl2 i2 th2 mothe2
KANGASKHAN's bell2 pouch.

Bu2 onl2 POKéMON ca2 us2 th2
techniqu2 SUBSTITUTE\.

Wan2 m2 t2 teac2 SUBSTITUT2 t2
on2 o2 you2 POKéMON?"

entries.original:
"Which POKéMON wants to learn
SUBSTITUTE?"
entries.translated:
"Whic2 POKéMON want2 t2 lear2
SUBSTITUTE?"

entries.original:
"Oh, really?
SUBSTITUTE seems so fun\."
entries.translated:
"Oh, really?
SUBSTITUT2 seem2 s2 fun\."

entries.original:
"Boy, what I'd give to crawl inside
a KANGASKHAN belly pouch\."
entries.translated:
"Boy, wha2 I'd giv2 t2 craw2 insid2
a KANGASKHA2 bell2 pouch\."

entries.original:
"Not many people come out here.

If I train here, I'm convinced that
I'll get stronger and stronger.

Yep, stronger and stronger\.

How would you like to learn a move
like that? It's SWORDS DANCE."

"No2 man2 peopl2 com2 ou2 here.

I2 I trai2 here, I'm convince2 tha2
I'll ge2 stronge2 an2 stronger.

Yep, stronge2 an2 stronger\.

Ho2 woul2 yo2 lik2 t2 lear2 a mov2
lik2 that? It's SWORD2 DANCE."

entries.original:
"All right, pick which POKéMON
I should teach it to."
entries.translated:
"Al2 right, pic2 whic2 POKéMON
I shoul2 teac2 i2 to."

entries.original: "Well, that's fine, too."
entries.translated: "Well, that's fine, too."

entries.original:
"If only we could keep getting
stronger and stronger, eh?"
entries.translated:
"I2 onl2 w2 coul2 kee2 gettin2
stronge2 an2 stronger, eh?"

entries.original:
"The secrets of space\.
The mysteries of earth\.

There are so many things about
which we know so little.

But that should spur us to study
harder, not toss in the towel.

The only thing you should toss\.

Well, how about SEISMIC TOSS?
Should I teach that to a POKéMON?"
entries.translated:
"Th2 secret2 o2 space\.
Th2 mysterie2 o2 earth\.

Ther2 ar2 s2 man2 thing2 abou2
whic2 w2 kno2 s2 little.

Bu2 tha2 shoul2 spu2 u2 t2 stud2
harder, no2 tos2 i2 th2 towel.

Th2 onl2 thin2 yo2 shoul2 toss\.

Well, ho2 abou2 SEISMI2 TOSS?
Shoul2 I teac2 tha2 t2 a POKéMON?"

entries.original:
"Which POKéMON wants to learn

entries.translated:
"Whic2 POKéMON want2 t2 lear2
SEISMI2 TOSS?"

entries.original:
"Is that so?
I'm sure you'll be back for it."
entries.translated:
"I2 tha2 so?
I'm sur2 you'll b2 bac2 fo2 it."

entries.original:
"I hope you won't toss in the towel.
Keep it up."
entries.translated:
"I hop2 yo2 won't tos2 i2 th2 towel.
Kee2 i2 up."

entries.original:
"Oh, hi!
I finally finished POKéMON.

Not done yet? How about I teach
you a good move?

The move I have in mind is
COUNTER.

Not like the one I'm leaning on,
mind you!"

"Oh, hi!
I finall2 finishe2 POKéMON.

No2 don2 yet? Ho2 abou2 I teac2
yo2 a goo2 move?

Th2 mov2 I hav2 i2 min2 i2
COUNTER.

No2 lik2 th2 on2 I'm leanin2 on,
min2 you!"

"Which POKéMON should I teach

entries.translated:
"Whic2 POKéMON shoul2 I teac2
COUNTE2 to?"

entries.original:
"You're not interested? Come see

entries.translated:
"You're no2 interested? Com2 se2
m2 i2 yo2 chang2 you2 mind."

entries.original:
"Are you using that COUNTER move

entries.translated:
"Ar2 yo2 usin2 tha2 COUNTE2 mov2

entries.original:
"Tch-tch-tch!
I'll teach you a nifty move.

Teach it to a POKéMON, and watch
the fun unfold!

It's a move called METRONOME.
Does it strike your fancy?"
entries.translated:
"Tch-tch-tch!
I'll teac2 yo2 a nift2 move.

Teac2 i2 t2 a POKéMON, an2 watc2
th2 fu2 unfold!

It's a mov2 calle2 METRONOME.
Doe2 i2 strik2 you2 fancy?"

entries.original:
"Okay!
Which POKéMON should I teach?"
entries.translated:
"Okay!
Whic2 POKéMON shoul2 I teach?"

entries.original: "I tell you, it's a lot of fun!"
entries.translated: "I tel2 you, it's a lo2 o2 fun!"

entries.original:
"Tch-tch-tch!
That's the sound of a METRONOME.

It tweaks your POKéMON's brain into
using moves it doesn't even know."
entries.translated:
"Tch-tch-tch!
That's th2 soun2 o2 a METRONOME.

I2 tweak2 you2 POKéMON's brai2 int2

entries.original:
"Oh wow!
A POKé DOLL!

For me?
Thank you!

You know what?
I can teach the move MIMIC."
entries.translated:
"O2 wow!

Fo2 me?

Yo2 kno2 what?
I ca2 teac2 th2 mov2 MIMIC."

entries.translated:

Who's goin2 t2 lear2 it?"

entries.original: "Don't you like MIMIC?"
entries.translated: "Don't yo2 lik2 MIMIC?"

entries.original:
"Ready?

We're having a BODY SLAM match

This is the POKéMON!

This [buffer1] is worthy of

Will you allow it?

entries.original:
"Hello\.

I am the owner of this TOWER\.

rooftop\.

Th2 cares2 o2 th2 wind2 u2 here\.

Th2 wa2 yo2 battled\.

entries.original: "This is for you\."
entries.translated: "Thi2 i2 fo2 you\."

entries.original:
"Oh!

It's marvelou2 ho2 you've com2 u2
